case_title: HUNTER, SHARON MISS VS SCOTT, JACK et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $520.00 FILED BY HUNTER, SHARON MISS AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTT, JACK MEYER, MIKE MISSION BAY GOLF CENTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-15-1994 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-19-1994 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01 TRIAL OF AUG-15-1994 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-19-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-03-1994 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUNTER, SHARON MISS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MEYER, MIKE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF TIME & PLACE OF HRG TO SHARON HISS HUNTER RETURNED ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.
